title: hieracium benzianum subsp. microvulgatum
intro: Hieracium benzianum subsp. microvulgatum, a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium genus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium benzianum subsp. microvulgatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be dried, powdered, and used as a tea or added to supplements.
